name: Fresh Pair Goblin Live
description: Watches fresh Solana pairs with liquidity, age, volume, holder, creator-wallet, and token-risk filters before any user-confirmed live intent.
degenPitch: Sniff new pairs early, then make the wallet ask before it apes.
whatItDoes: Watches fresh pair feeds and custom token webhooks.
Filters by min liquidity, max pair age, min volume, holder concentration, and creator wallet risk.
Creates signal or user-confirmed trade intents without backend signing.
notInBetaScope: Direct Pump.fun trading without adapter tests
cursorPrompt: Build a Fresh Pair Goblin Live agent with DNA x402. Watch fresh Solana pairs, apply liquidity/age/volume/holder risk filters, default to signal mode, create user-confirmed intents only, and never backend sign.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Fresh Pair Goblin Live agent with DNA x402. Watch fresh Solana pairs, apply liquidity/age/volume/holder risk filters, default to signal mode, create user-confirmed intents only, and never backend sign.
receiptProofBehavior: Receipt binds alert or paid detail unlock.
No live submit runs without user signature.
